channel.title: klaa interactive — Blog
channel.description: Stories, engineering insights, and updates from klaa interactive.

item.title: Why we build in the open
item.description: Transparency as a design principle — from code to company.

item.title: Our approach to real-time systems
item.description: How we think about building infrastructure that scales with human connection.

item.title: Introducing klaa interactive
item.description: A new kind of interactive technology company, built from the ground up to create experiences that matter.
